title: lithospermum notatum
intro: Lithospermum notatum, also known as Blue Campions or Gromwell, is a perennial herb native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa, belonging to the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system. The health benefits of Lithospermum notatum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its role in supporting the immune system and reducing the risk of infections. Lithospermum notatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or ointment, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
